data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of time tracking by project phase and deliverable, but there is no evidence provided that confirms this functionality is implemented or operational. The linked use case outlines various needs, including time tracking, but does not provide specific evidence of how time is tracked by project phase and deliverable. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of time tracking by project phase and deliverable being implemented or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
